definition: cause and effect is the reason something happens and the result of what happens
example: The photos showed the cause of the fire and the effect of it.

definition: an impression is a feeling or opinion you have about a person after meeting with them
example: Janka’s first impression of Oleysa was very positive.

definition: solar lights get their power from the sun instead of electricity
example: We will replace the lights outside with solar lights to save money on electricity.

definition: a percentage is a number out of 100 that shows the amount of something else
example: The percentage of women studying math, science, and engineering has doubled in the last 10 years.

definition: a delivery driver is someone who takes letters, food, or other things to people’s houses or place of work
example: The delivery driver got lost on the way to our office, so our food was cold when it arrived.

definition: a parking attendant is someone who helps you with your car in a specific place where you can leave it
example: The parking attendant showed us where to pay for our parking.

definition: a website designer is someone who creates sites on the internet for people or businesses
example: Tiago is a well-known website designer and builds amazing websites for companies.

definition: a lamplighter was a person in the past who was paid to carry a long stick with a fire on one end to light big candles on the streets
example: Since electricity became common, there’s been no need for people to work as lamplighters.

definition: a switchboard operator answers phone calls for a business and directs the calls to the right person
example: The switchboard operator directed over 100 phone calls to different people in an hour.

definition: a carriage driver is a person who drives a type of cart pulled by horses that transports people
example: The carriage driver led the horses so well that the ride was smooth.

definition: a cashier is the person who takes your money when you buy something at a store
example: The cashier gave Brandon change for EUR20.

definition: a computer programmer writes and tests the codes computers use to work
example: The company wants to hire another computer programmer to develop their new software.

definition: a care worker is someone who helps other people to do personal things like shower and eat because they can’t do it themselves
example: Liesl is looking for a care worker who can help her grandfather at home.

definition: a postal worker is someone who delivers mail or works in the post office
example: The postal worker told me there was a parcel and many letters for me today.

definition: a vegetable picker is someone who works on a farm and picks fruit or vegetables when they are ripe
example: In the summer, the farmer needs 10 more vegetable pickers to help with the harvest.

definition: green energy is energy that we get from natural things like water, wind, and the sun and use to power other things
example: Solar energy and wind energy are examples of green energy resources.

definition: biofuel power is energy that we get from burning things like cooking oil to make a new type of power to make machines work
example: Our new car runs on biofuel power made from old cooking oil.

definition: solar power is energy that we get from the sun and can use to make machines work
example: More people are using solar power instead of electricity because it is cheaper.

definition: hydropower is energy that we get from water and can use to make machines work
example: Hydropower works by changing flowing water from a river or dam into electricity.

definition: a camper is a vehicle that a car pulls and people can live in or stay in when on vacation
example: The family likes to use their camper when they go on vacation because it’s cheaper than hotels.

definition: economics is the study of how business and trade works and money is used
example: His plan is to get a degree in economics and then work abroad for a year.

definition: something that is organic is completely natural and does not include anything man-made
example: The menu includes organic meat and fresh vegetables.

definition: rubber is a strong material that bends easily and is used to make other products
example: Put a rubber band around these cards to hold them together.

definition: if you manage someone or a group of people, you control what they do and how they do it
example: Managing people can be a difficult job because you have to tell them what to do at work.

definition: something that is eco-friendly does not hurt the environment
example: The new car’s eco-friendly design should interest many people.

definition: an admin assistant is a person who helps other people with their work in an office
example: The admin assistant helped the manager to type all the reports for the meeting.

definition: if you say a job is your dream job, you mean it is a position that combines your skill and passion for something with a way to make money
example: Xavier’s dream job is to be a writer and tell stories.

definition: a mummy is a dead body that has been preserved with special chemicals and wrapped in cloth, often in ancient Egypt
example: The scientists found a 2,000-year-old mummy in the tomb.

definition: hieroglyphs are an ancient way of writing in ancient
example: Egypt, using picture-like characters for words The hieroglyphs in the tomb told an interesting story about the family.

definition: a symbol is an object or a picture that represents something else
example: A heart shape is often used as a symbol of love.

definition: an astronaut is a person who is trained to work in space
example: The astronaut went to space for one year.

definition: an accountant is a person who checks that finances are right for a person or a company
example: The accountant worked all night to finish the financial report.

definition: customer service is the support and advice a company gives to the people who use its products or services
example: If you need help with your laptop, contact the company’s customer service department.

definition: someone who is disrespectful is rude and does not show any respect
example: In some countries, it’s disrespectful to keep your shoes on when you visit someone’s home.

definition: if you say you sell yourself, you mean you show people all the great things you can do that make them want to hire you
example: When applying for a job, it’s important to sell oneself and have a good CV.

definition: a strength is a skill or quality you have
example: Krishna is an excellent lawyer and has many strengths.

definition: a weakness is a quality you have that is not good or effective
example: The report shows the weaknesses in the industry.

definition: currently means at this time
example: The orchestra is currently performing in Austria.

definition: your education history is a list of the schools you’ve attended and what you studied
example: List your full education history on your CV.

definition: someone who works freelance does work, usually at home, for several different companies for a short period of time
example: Thilo left his full-time job at a company to work as a freelance writer instead.

definition: someone who is enthusiastic has or shows a lot of interest in things
example: Pepe is enthusiastic about photography.

definition: someone who is outgoing likes to talk to people and is interested to learn more about them
example: Harriet is an outgoing person who enjoys meeting new people.

definition: a passion is a strong feeling or liking of something
example: Kiaan has a passion for languages and speaks five languages.

definition: if you exhibit your work somewhere, you show it by putting it on display for other people to look at
example: Several of Picasso and Dali’s paintings will be exhibited next month at The Louvre.

definition: if you publish work, you make it available for sale to the public
example: The company mostly publishes textbooks.

definition: a conference is a type of meeting that is held to discuss a specific topic
example: Aaron is attending an IT conference in Berlin.
